## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.15.12

### 🔔 Notifications
- Waits for camera recording media to be cached before firing the notification-ready event.
- Keeps notification links on the X-Sense Recordings panel route so playback is opened from Home Assistant instead of a raw media URL.

### 🎥 Recordings
- Handles X-Sense direct HD recordings that are returned as HLS playlists.
- Caches the first playable HLS segments before exposing the clip, then continues caching the rest in the background.
- Serves cached HLS playlists and segments through short-lived playback tokens.

### 🛠️ Repairs
- Removes blocking file checks from the recordings panel runtime path.
- Keeps stale recordings runtime cleanup in place for accounts without camera devices.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for HD HLS recording cache, progressive HLS readiness, HLS panel playback, and camera-gated recordings setup.
- Validates the integration with the full test suite.
